descriptions: The Pecoraro-Renna clan clashed with the De Feo clan.
edges.evidence_quote: I Pecoraro-Renna si scontrarono con il clan De Feo di Bellizzi, appartenente alla Nuova Camorra Organizzata.

descriptions: After conflict, the Pecoraro-Renna and De Feo clans formed an alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: Dopo i pesanti contrasti, i Pecoraro-Renna ed i De Feo hanno stretto una alleanza

descriptions: Bandidos members murdered members of the Vanløse Group in 2015.
edges.evidence_quote: A Bandidos member holding the rank of krigsminister (“minister for war”) within the club was convicted of the 11 November 2015 triple murder of Philip Rasmussen, Suhaib Jaffar, and Mike Patrick Winther, members of a gang known as the Vanløse Group who were killed with a revolver and a shotgun as they slept in their apartment in Frederiksberg, Copenhagen.

descriptions: MOD and Asian Crips were in a turf war.
edges.evidence_quote: M.O.D. and other Hmong gangs such as Asian Crips were involved in a turf war with each other, which resulted in more than 120 shootings in the area.

descriptions: Los Zetas Viejos are the original members of Los Zetas, mostly former GAFE members.
edges.evidence_quote: Eran los "originales" y que, en su mayoría, fueron exmiembros del "Grupo Aeromovil de las Fuerzas Especiales" (GAFE)

Oda-gumi.description: The Oda-gumi is a yakuza organization founded in 1958 by Hideomi 'Joji' Oda in Osaka, Japan. It operates as a subsidiary of the Yamaguchi-gumi syndicate. The group has been involved in internal conflicts and leadership disputes, and has faced legal issues including arrests of its leaders. As of 2021, its future is uncertain due to leadership demotions and ongoing troubles.

descriptions: Kobe Yamaguchi-gumi members attacked Oda-gumi by crashing a car into its offices.
edges.evidence_quote: members of the Yamaken faction, Kobe Yamaguchi-gumi, deliberately crashed a car into Oda-gumi's offices in March 2016.

descriptions: Oda-gumi is a subsidiary organization of Yamaguchi-gumi.
edges.evidence_quote: Oda-gumi would join the powerful Yamaguchi-gumi syndicate as a subsidiary organization under third generation kumicho Kazuo Taoka in 1964

descriptions: Yamaken-gumi members attacked Oda-gumi by crashing a car into its offices.
edges.evidence_quote: The recent split between Yamaguchi-gumi and Watanabe's former Yamaken-gumi faction has again brought the Tsukasa aligned Oda-gumi into the spotlight as members of the Yamaken faction, Kobe Yamaguchi-gumi, deliberately crashed a car into Oda-gumi's offices in March 2016.

descriptions: The Misso clan fought against the allied Tolomelli and Vastarella clans in 1997-1998.
edges.evidence_quote: prima faida della Sanità : fu combattuta negli anni 1997 e 1998 tra il clan Misso e i clan, alleati tra loro, Tolomelli e Vastarella

descriptions: Tolomelli and Vastarella families were forced to leave the neighborhood due to conflict with Misso clan.
edges.evidence_quote: con il passare degli anni i boss Tolomelli e Vastarella sono stati costretti ad abbandonare il quartiere con le loro famiglie

descriptions: The Tolomelli and Vastarella clans were allies in the faida against Misso.
edges.evidence_quote: prima faida della Sanità : fu combattuta negli anni 1997 e 1998 tra il clan Misso e i clan, alleati tra loro, Tolomelli e Vastarella

descriptions: The Daniel clan and the Lyons Crime Family are involved in a violent vendetta.
edges.evidence_quote: Glasgow's crime families are often involved in violent feuds, as with the vendetta between the Daniel clan and the Lyons Crime Family .

K&A Gang.description: The K&A Gang is a predominantly Irish-American criminal network based in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, founded after World War II. Originally a burglary ring, it later expanded into loansharking, illegal gambling, racketeering, and drug trafficking. The gang controlled Philadelphia's Irish-American underworld for much of the late 20th century and maintains ties with other organized crime groups.

descriptions: Genovese family lists K&A Gang as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno, Colombo, DeCavalcante, Detroit, Gambino, Lucchese (New Jersey faction), Philadelphia, K&A Gang

descriptions: The Green Street Counts connected with the K&A Gang after release from prison.
edges.evidence_quote: After their release the Counts would later connect with the K&A Gang of Philadelphia's Kensington section.

descriptions: The K&A Gang had amicable ties with the Genovese crime family's South Jersey faction.
edges.evidence_quote: but also the South Jersey faction of the New York City -based Genovese crime family

descriptions: K&A Gang member John Berkery was indicted alongside Scarfo crime family soldier Raymond Martorano for a methamphetamine ring.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1987, Scarfo crime family soldier Raymond Martorano, Berkery, and dozens of others, were indicted for their involvement in a large methamphetamine ring.

descriptions: The K&A Gang had amicable ties with the Scarfo crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: They were known to have amicable ties to the La Cosa Nostra , namely the Scarfo crime family

descriptions: The K&A Gang had amicable ties with the local Greek mob.
edges.evidence_quote: the local Greek mob

descriptions: Listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: K&A Gang

descriptions: The infobox lists the K&A Gang as an ally of the Philadelphia Greek Mob.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: K&A Gang , Philadelphia crime family

descriptions: Morticians MC is listed as a rival of Bullshit MC in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Hells Angels MC Morticians MC, Black Sheep MC, Galloping Goose MC (Denmark)

descriptions: Morticians were affiliated with Hells Angels and carried out a murder on their behalf.
edges.evidence_quote: Carsten Bresløv (born June 9, 1958), a member of the Morticians who were a club affiliated with the Hells Angels at the time, entered the store wearing a mask and shot Blåbjerg.

descriptions: Morticians were a support club of Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: The Morticians were initially a support club of the Hells Angels

descriptions: Morticians MC is a Hells Angels affiliated support club.
edges.evidence_quote: Blåbjerg would end up being shot dead by a member of the Morticians MC - a Hells Angels affiliated support club.

Bergin Hunt and Fish Club.description: The Bergin Hunt and Fish Club was a former hangout of the Gambino crime family in Queens, New York. Despite its name, it was not a legitimate hunting or fishing club but a front for criminal activities such as truck hijacking and loansharking. The club consisted of two connected brick-front stores located at 98-04 101st Avenue in Ozone Park, Queens.

descriptions: The club served as a hangout for the Gambino crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: The Bergin Hunt and Fish Club was a former Gambino crime family hangout in Queens , New York.

descriptions: The Corbi family functionally headed the Baltimore Crew after 1920.
edges.evidence_quote: The Corbi family acquiesced to the Gambino relationship, but maintained local leaders, simply answering to and accessing support from Morici and his New York Gambino connections.

descriptions: A Corbi family member murdered a reputed Camorra member.
edges.evidence_quote: Patsy Corbi was sentenced to life imprisonment for the murder of local barber Frank Naples, a reputed Camorra member.

descriptions: The College Kidnappers targeted members of the Al Capone mob for kidnapping.
edges.evidence_quote: Most of the victims snatched by The College Kidnappers were a part of the Al Capone mob.

descriptions: The Capone mob attempted to negotiate a payoff to stop the kidnappings, indicating a cooperative interaction.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1933, the Capone gangsters cornered Babe Jones, a member of The College Kidnappers, telling him to pass along the message of a payoff to stop kidnapping other Capone gangsters.

descriptions: Aggi Crew demanded tax from Yardie gangs, leading to a turf war with shootings.
edges.evidence_quote: The yardies did not agree with this however and stormed a cafe run by the Aggis, which doubled as a front for an illegal gambling operation. Thus was started a small-scale turf war which included a number of shootings

descriptions: Amsterdam Hooligans 5th is a main group within AFCA.
edges.evidence_quote: The main groups within the AFCA hooligan firm are: - Amsterdam Hooligans 5th

Atomwaffen Division.description: International far-right extremist and neo-Nazi network formed in 2015 and based in the Southern United States. It expanded across the US and several other countries, described as one of the most violent neo-Nazi movements of the 21st century. Members have been responsible for murders, bombings, and planned terrorist attacks. Designated as a terrorist group by multiple governments including the UK and Canada.

descriptions: Aryan Renaissance Society is listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Aryan Renaissance Society (prison), Azov Battalion, Active Club Network, Combat 18, Nordic Resistance Movement, Order of Nine Angles, Russian Imperial Movement, Rusich Group, The Base

descriptions: Atomwaffen members sought training with Azov Battalion.
edges.evidence_quote: Atomwaffen members also sought to train with the Azov Battalion and Russian Imperial Movement.

descriptions: Atomwaffen and Black Order cooperated to form a border patrol militia.
edges.evidence_quote: Atomwaffen and Finnish lodge of the Black Order also formed a border patrol militia in co-operation, recruiting former military police.

descriptions: Combat 18 is listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Aryan Renaissance Society (prison), Azov Battalion, Active Club Network, Combat 18, Nordic Resistance Movement, Order of Nine Angles, Russian Imperial Movement, Rusich Group, The Base

descriptions: AWDSS had close relations with Feuerkrieg Division.
edges.evidence_quote: AWDSS also maintained particularly close relations with the Feuerkrieg Division in neighboring Estonia.

descriptions: Feuerkrieg Division is a subgroup of Atomwaffen Division in the Baltic states.
edges.evidence_quote: Baltic states (Feuerkrieg Division)

descriptions: Feuerkrieg Division was modeled after Atomwaffen Division.
edges.evidence_quote: In October 2018, a group which was modeled after Atomwaffen and called itself the Feuerkrieg Division was established in the Baltic states

descriptions: Both groups were linked to the IronMarch forum.
edges.evidence_quote: the Neo-fascist and Neo-Nazi web forum IronMarch.org, which, prior to its shutdown in 2017, had been linked to several acts of Neo-Nazi terrorism and violent militant groups such as the Nordic Resistance Movement, National Action, CasaPound, and Golden Dawn

descriptions: Former National Action members formed the British branch of Atomwaffen Division.
edges.evidence_quote: British neo-Nazi terrorists from the former National Action who went on to form the British branch of the Atomwaffen Division

descriptions: Both groups were linked to the IronMarch forum.
edges.evidence_quote: the Neo-fascist and Neo-Nazi web forum IronMarch.org, which, prior to its shutdown in 2017, had been linked to several acts of Neo-Nazi terrorism and violent militant groups such as the Nordic Resistance Movement

descriptions: AWDSS formed from former NRM members after NRM was banned.
edges.evidence_quote: Atomwaffen Division Finland "Siitoin Squadron" ( AWDSS ) was formed after the ban of the Nordic Resistance Movement (NRM) in 2019, following members of the underground group embracing accelerationism and occultism.

descriptions: Northern Order is an affiliated organization of Atomwaffen Division in Canada.
edges.evidence_quote: The group also had a presence in Canada via an affiliated organization called Northern Order that included members of the Canadian Armed Forces.

descriptions: Nuovo Ordine Sociale is the Italian chapter of Atomwaffen Division.
edges.evidence_quote: Atomwaffen had a full-fledged chapter in Italy with 38 members, formed in Savona. The group was called Nuovo Ordine Sociale

descriptions: Atomwaffen had ties to the Order of Nine Angles.
edges.evidence_quote: As of 2018, Atomwaffen had ties to various affiliated neo-Nazi groups and the fascist Satanist Order of Nine Angles (O9A), an organization which advocates rape and human sacrifice.

descriptions: Both groups were involved in radicalizing an individual.
edges.evidence_quote: Rudd was allegedly radicalized by Atomwaffen and ONA.

descriptions: Atomwaffen Division's Russian branch was connected to the Russian O9A chapter.
edges.evidence_quote: AWD Russland was connected to the Russian O9A chapter

descriptions: AWDSS shared membership with Finnish O9A nexions.
edges.evidence_quote: AWDSS was connected to and shared membership with Finnish O9A nexions.

descriptions: Rusich Group is listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Aryan Renaissance Society (prison), Azov Battalion, Active Club Network, Combat 18, Nordic Resistance Movement, Order of Nine Angles, Russian Imperial Movement, Rusich Group, The Base

descriptions: Atomwaffen Division's Russian branch was in a coalition with Rusich Group.
edges.evidence_quote: AWD Russland was part of a coalition of neo-Nazi groups taking part in Russian invasion of Ukraine consisting of Russian ONA, Rusich Group and Russian Imperial Movement

descriptions: Atomwaffen members sought training with Russian Imperial Movement.
edges.evidence_quote: Atomwaffen members also sought to train with the Azov Battalion and Russian Imperial Movement.

descriptions: Atomwaffen Division received military training from Russian Imperial Movement.
edges.evidence_quote: It received military training from the Russian Imperial Movement

descriptions: Russian Imperial Movement provided paramilitary training to Finnish neo-Nazis, including Atomwaffen members.
edges.evidence_quote: In addition to Azov, the Russian Imperial Movement had also provided paramilitary training to the Finnish neo-Nazis.

descriptions: Sonnenkrieg Division is the UK branch of Atomwaffen Division.
edges.evidence_quote: The Sonnenkrieg Division ... was a neo-Nazi group that was the United Kingdom-based branch of the Atomwaffen Division

descriptions: Sonnenkrieg Division is a related group, but the text does not specify the nature of the tie beyond co-occurrence.
edges.evidence_quote: In February 2020, Sonnenkrieg Division became the second far-right group to be banned as a terrorist organization after National Action.

descriptions: Tempel ov Blood infiltrated and took over Atomwaffen Division.
edges.evidence_quote: The ToB infiltrated and effectively took over the AWD, beginning in 2017.

descriptions: The Base is listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Aryan Renaissance Society (prison), Azov Battalion, Active Club Network, Combat 18, Nordic Resistance Movement, Order of Nine Angles, Russian Imperial Movement, Rusich Group, The Base

descriptions: Atomwaffen members attended Azov training camps.
edges.evidence_quote: According to an investigation by German Amadeu Antonio Foundation published on April 19, 2021, the members were acquiring Uzi submachine guns and had attended Azov training camps in Ukraine.

descriptions: A neo-Nazi affiliated with Atomwaffen was connected to Serbian Combat 18.
edges.evidence_quote: The man was discovered to be connected to Serbian Combat 18 and to another local neo-Nazi gang, " MC Srbi".

descriptions: Serbian Combat 18 trafficked firearms to Atomwaffen Division.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2019 Serbian Combat 18 was discovered to be trafficking firearms to Atomwaffen neo-Nazis selling handguns, assault rifles, grenades and RPG-7s from the Balkans to French neo-Nazis in Marseille.

descriptions: Finnish Atomwaffen members frequented Crew 38 headquarters.
edges.evidence_quote: Crew 38 came under police investigation in connection to the Kankaanpää terrorism arrests when the leader and members of the Finnish Atomwaffen group frequented the Crew 38 headquarters in Muurame and Kerava.

descriptions: Atomwaffen member Patrik Mathews was also affiliated with The Base.
edges.evidence_quote: He was also accused of being affiliated with The Base.

descriptions: The Base has links to Atomwaffen Division.
edges.evidence_quote: The group has links to the Atomwaffen Division and the Feuerkrieg Division, which are far-right extremist groups.

descriptions: WolfSSChanze is a splinter faction of Rock Machine.
edges.evidence_quote: WolfSSChanze Faction - a splinter faction of the Rock Machine led by Suat Erköse.

descriptions: MNLA is the armed wing of NMSP.
edges.evidence_quote: The Mon National Liberation Army (MNLA) has been fighting government forces since 1949.

descriptions: Pandilla Mao Mao is listed as an enemy of Mara Salvatrucha in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Mara Barrio 18 , Nayib Bukele , Gobierno salvadoreño , Pandilla Mao Mao , Gobierno federal de los Estados Unidos , Cártel de Juárez , Los Negros , Sombra Negra , Cártel de Tijuana , Cártel de los Beltrán Leyva , Bloods , Norteños , Armenian Power , Latin Kings y Los Del Sur

Imperial Klans of America.description: White supremacist, white nationalist, neo-Nazi paramilitary organization founded in 1996 by Ron Edwards in Dawson Springs, Kentucky. It was the second largest Klan group in the United States until the late 2000s, and briefly the largest in the early 2000s. The group has been weakened by legal judgments and Edwards' imprisonment, but remained active as of 2020 with only two chapters by 2012.

descriptions: Edwards joined the Federation of Klans before founding the IKA.
edges.evidence_quote: In July 1994, he joined the short-lived Federation of Klans after it broke away from the Knights of the KKK

edges.target: Knights of the Ku Klux Klan
descriptions: Edwards was a member of the Knights of the Ku Klux Klan before founding the IKA.
edges.evidence_quote: In the early 1990s, Ron Edwards was the head of a Kentucky-based klavern (local unit) of the Knights of the Ku Klux Klan . In July 1994, he joined the short-lived Federation of Klans after it broke away from the Knights of the KKK

descriptions: The IKA claims to be a continuation of the Ku Klux Klan.
edges.evidence_quote: The group describes itself as the sixth era of the Ku Klux Klan

descriptions: The Supreme White Alliance assisted the IKA with hate rock gatherings until breaking ties after Edwards' arrest.
edges.evidence_quote: the Supreme White Alliance, a white power skinhead group that had been assisting the IKA with annual hate rock gatherings, decided to break ties with the IKA after Edwards' arrest.

descriptions: Loners absorbed the Vigilantes as a support club in a patch-over ceremony.
edges.evidence_quote: By absorbing the local Vigilantes Motorcycle Club, which had acted as their support club, this was done in a patch over ceremony that happened in September 2012.

descriptions: Nueva Mafia Zeta is a successor faction of Los Zetas.
edges.evidence_quote: Estatus: Desarticulado, operan como facciones Cártel del Noreste , Zetas Vieja Escuela , Sangre Nueva Zeta, Los Talibanes (cártel ubicado en Zacatecas), Los Alemanes , Nueva Mafia Zeta.

descriptions: The Schuele Boys have a rivalry with the East Ferry Street Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: East Ferry Street Gang
